curation_notes: Patch commit is the merge of PR #501 into master. Only one non-test source file was changed: XMLSchedulingDataProcessor.java. The fix adds six XML parser security features to the initDocumentParser method to disable DOCTYPE declarations, external DTDs, external general/parameter entities, XInclude processing, and entity reference expansion. The sibling file ValidationException.java in the same package does not perform XML parsing and is not affected. The pre-assigned vulnerability class 'xxe' matches the advisory description (XXE via job description), CWE-611, and the patch content.
